name: n8n-community-leverage
description: Ranks the n8n open backlog by leverage — what to fix and review first.

scripts.fetch: gh api --paginate --slurp '/repos/n8n-io/n8n/issues?state=open&per_page=100' > data/issues_raw.json && gh api --paginate --slurp '/repos/n8n-io/n8n/pulls?state=open&per_page=100' > data/pulls_raw.json
